welcome.description:
Practice real Korean conversations
with AI

setup.step4Subtitle: Pick as many as you like.
setup.step5Subtitle: This sets the initial difficulty and number of conversation turns.

level.beginnerDesc: Essentials like greetings, ordering, asking directions
level.intermediateDesc: Hold a natural back-and-forth on everyday topics
level.advancedDesc: Engage in deep conversations with opinions and reasoning

review.title: Conversation Review

review.chosungDesc: Guess the word from its initial consonants

No review content yet.

review.chosungInstruction: Pick the word that matches these initial consonants
review.allDone:
All reviews complete!
Try a new conversation.

result.title: Conversation Complete!
result.sessionLostDesc:
The server no longer has a record of this conversation.
Please start a new one to try again.

levelUp.title: Belt Promotion
levelUp.subtitle: Check if you're ready to reach the next belt
levelUp.maxLevelNote: You've already reached the top belt
levelUp.reqSessions: Complete 5+ conversations at your current belt
levelUp.reqScore: Average score 8+ over the last 5 conversations
levelUp.reqExam: Earn score 8+ on the next belt exam
levelUp.examFinished: The exam is over! Ready to see your result?
levelUp.demoteDesc: Your recent average was below the threshold, so your belt was adjusted from {{prev}} to {{next}}.
levelUp.systemNote: The promotion exam runs one belt above your current level. Score 8 or above to promote.

beltGuide.title: Belt Guide
beltGuide.lead: A skill tier raised via the promotion exam.
beltGuide.note: Belt ≠ Level. Level is activity (XP) earned per conversation. Belt is a skill tier raised only by passing the promotion exam.

level2.desc: Beginner · everyday expressions and short sentences

level5.desc: Advanced · logical debate and nuanced expression

history.title: History
history.empty:
No conversation history yet.
Complete a conversation to see it here!

settings.title: Settings
settings.guideDesc: Walk through the main concepts in one go
settings.tutorialDesc: See the home screen highlights again

tutorial.tierCard: Your current belt and level at a glance
tutorial.weeklyStats: Total chats, average score, and streak
tutorial.reviewBanner: Review with chosung quizzes and flashcards
tutorial.cta: Start a new conversation from here
tutorial.tabHome: Home — check your info and start a conversation
tutorial.tabHistory: History — past conversations and your SCK collection
tutorial.tabLevelUp: Promotion — check requirements and take the exam

flow.title: Learning Flow
flow.lead: One cycle runs from picking a location all the way to review.
bullets: Pick a location → pick a persona (role)
Talk with the AI — complete the mission within your turn limit
See the result, score, and detailed feedback
Review weak sessions with chosung quizzes and flashcards

beltVsLevel.title: Belt vs. Level
beltVsLevel.lead: Belt is your skill rank; Level is your activity. They move independently.
bullets: Belt (yellow→blue→purple→brown→red→black): a skill rank that only changes via the promotion exam
Belt color = Korean level = conversation difficulty. A higher belt means harder conversations
Level: an activity meter that grows from XP earned in every conversation
So stacking XP alone won't change your belt — you still need to pass the exam
The left border color on history cards shows the difficulty of that conversation

sck.title: SCK Vocabulary
sck.lead: SCK is Standard Curriculum of Korean vocabulary (levels 1–6; higher = more advanced).
bullets: Feedback shows how many of your words matched SCK entries
Matches are grouped by level so you can see which tier you lean on
The SCK Collection tab tracks everything you've picked up over time

scoring.title: Scoring & Grades
scoring.lead: Every conversation scores out of 10 across 5 axes and lands a grade (S, A, B, C).
bullets: Axes: length · vocabulary · scene/mission · relationship · spelling
You can obtain XP from every conversation, but higher grades earn more XP
Open detailed feedback to see per-axis scores and the reasoning

promotion.title: Promotion & Demotion
promotion.lead: Meet the requirements and you can take the exam; slip in recent scores and you may drop a belt.
bullets: Requirements: 5+ conversations at the current belt, recent 5-avg of 8+
When ready, the promotion tab icon shows a red ! badge
Earn score 8+ on the exam to move up a belt
If recent averages fall below the threshold, your belt can step down

review.title: Review & Hiding
review.lead: Weak sessions feed review automatically. You can hide any record you don't want revisited.
bullets: The review banner on home → chosung quiz and flashcards
Review auto-picks the sessions with the lowest recent scores
Hide a session from the History tab to exclude it from weakest-session review
Hidden sessions can be brought back with "Show hidden"

startConfirm.title: Start a conversation now?
startConfirm.subText: You can pick a location and generate a scenario.
